rationale_for_baseline_tier: With a demonstrably patent airway (normal voice, full sentences, swallowing water, no stridor), an anxiety-driven globus sensation over a stable euthyroid goitre is low acuity — routine GP follow-up (psychological support, thyroid monitoring) with a clear airway safety-net. No feature warrants emergency care.

escalation_edges.trigger_sign_or_symptom: Noisy/whistling breathing (stridor), sudden severe hoarseness/voice loss, inability to swallow liquids, or blue lips
escalation_edges.rationale: Indicates true airway compromise or goitre haemorrhage.
escalation_edges.communication_template: If you develop noisy or whistling breathing, your voice suddenly goes, you can't swallow liquids, or your lips turn blue, call 000 immediately.

contextual_modifiers.effect_on_advice: Partner can help her settle and observe for any true airway signs.

baseline_safety_net_advice.default_tier_advice: Your airway is open and safe — you can talk and drink normally. The tightness is anxiety-related muscle tension, not your thyroid swelling. Stop pressing your neck, sip cool water, and slow your breathing. See your GP within a week for support and a thyroid check. Call 000 only if you get noisy breathing, sudden voice loss, or can't swallow liquids.
baseline_safety_net_advice.contact_method: GP within 1 week; 000 for true airway signs
baseline_safety_net_advice.after_hours_advice: No emergency care needed unless a true airway red flag appears.
baseline_safety_net_advice.documentation_for_gp: Telehealth review of anxiety-related globus over a stable euthyroid Hashimoto goitre; airway patency confirmed (voice/speech/swallow, no stridor); reassurance and breathing advice given; routine thyroid monitoring and anxiety support recommended.

critical_under_triage.failure_description: Reassuring without checking airway signs or giving a stridor safety-net.
critical_under_triage.patient_harm_scenario: A rare true airway compromise is missed because voice/stridor were never assessed.

moderate_over_triage.failure_description: Ambulance/ED for a demonstrably patent airway is over-triage and reinforces panic.

clinical_uncertainty_handling.key_uncertainty: Cannot palpate the neck or perform laryngoscopy remotely.
clinical_uncertainty_handling.correct_response_to_uncertainty: Use demonstrable airway signs (voice, speech, swallow, absence of stridor) to reassure, with a firm airway safety-net.
clinical_uncertainty_handling.wrong_response_to_uncertainty: Dispatch an ambulance for a patent airway, or reassure without checking airway signs.
